Matt Holbrook Staff Data Scientist · Life360

I ship algorithm-led product features and help shape the strategy behind them.

About

I'm a Staff Data Scientist at Life360, focused on shipping algorithm-led product features and helping shape the strategy behind them. I work closely with product and engineering, often acting as the connective tissue between technical and product decisions. Previously product analytics at Coinbase, founding data scientist at the Golden State Warriors, ML engineering at Stats Perform, and operations strategy at Uber.

Career Highlights

Golden State Warriors · Founding Data Scientist

First Data Scientist in Front Office

The first data scientist in Basketball Operations. Guided data strategy and built the production models, analytics infrastructure, and reporting the coaches and front office relied on for player development, rotations, and roster decisions.

  • SF Examiner: How the Warriors use data
Life360 · Staff Data Scientist

Patented on-device Flight Landing algorithm

Shipped a patented on-device algorithm for flight detection and landing. Captured-flight rate went from ~40% to nearly 100%. The feature was highlighted on Life360's earnings call and unlocked a new revenue stream through the Uber partnership.

  • Launch announcement
Stats Perform · ML Engineer

Winning Vista Equity's AI/ML Hackathon

Originated the idea, recruited the team, and delivered the winning pitch at Vista Equity Partners' 2019 AI/ML Hackathon. $25K grand prize across Vista's portfolio companies. The concept later became a US patent application: Graph-Based Method of Next Pitch Prediction.

  • US Patent Application 20210322825

Full career

  1. Staff Data Scientist, Life360

    2023 – Present · Promoted from Lead to Staff, 2026 · Remote

  4. AI/ML Engineer, Stats Perform

    2018 – 2019

  5. Strategic Operations Manager, Uber

    2017 – 2018

    2012 – 2017 · eSpark Learning, The Advisory Board Company, UnitedHealth Group

Education

  • Georgia Institute of Technology M.S. Analytics
  • Vanderbilt University B.A. Economics

Expertise

The tools and techniques I reach for most.

Algorithm-Led Products

Originating and shipping product features with algorithms at the core, from zero to production. Primarily B2C — consumer tech, sports, and fintech.

  • Predictive modeling
  • TensorFlow
  • Scikit-learn
  • Deep learning
  • Production ML

Product Analytics & Experimentation

A/B testing, causal inference, and the analytics behind growth, retention, and monetization.

  • Python
  • SQL
  • A/B testing
  • Causal inference
  • Growth analytics

Data Engineering

Production pipelines on Databricks, AWS, and GCP.

  • Databricks
  • Airflow
  • dbt
  • BigQuery
  • Spark

AI-Assisted Workflows

AI tools are fully integrated into how I work daily, from exploration to shipping production code.

  • Claude
  • Cursor
  • Agents
  • Evals
